defaults.rule: Always run step-01-init first — config must be loaded before any PR action.
Show every gh command before running. Wait for user confirmation.
For review: be honest. Three sections — good, improvable, uncertain. Never bluff.
pr-memories.md is append-only — never overwrite it. Always add a new entry after review.

route.when: review my prs, review pr, review pull request, check my prs, assigned prs, prs to review, review assigned pr, what prs do i have to review
route.goal: List PRs assigned for review, user picks one, analyze diff against AGENTS.md and pr-memories.md, discuss with user, post comments, submit decision, save to pr-memories.md.

steps.step: List, select, fetch diff, analyze, discuss, post comments, submit, remember.

disambiguation.rule: "review my prs" and similar phrases always mean review-pr.
If the user asks to create a PR, use gh-submit-pr instead.
If not in a git repo, say so and stop immediately.
